news.headline: iTeos plans to announce TIGIT clinical data from 2 trials with >400 patients, with $683.9 million cash balance lasting through 2027.
news.summary: iTeos Therapeutics, Inc. provided a business update for 2025, mentioning anticipated data readouts including over 400 patients from two Phase 2 trials and one Phase 1/2 study evaluating belrestotug + dostarlimab in 1L NSCLC and 1L HNSCC. They also highlighted the potential of EOS-984 Phase 1 monotherapy and PD-1 combination data expected in the second half of 2025, as well as an IND submission for EOS-215 in the first quarter of 2025. The company's cash balance and investment balance of $683.9 million as of September 30, 2024, is expected to last through 2027. Earlier studies indicated advancements in therapy targeting the tumor microenvironment's resistance mechanisms, with TIGIT datasets aiming to highlight differentiation with their unique TIGIT:PD-1 doublet. Program highlights include the development of belrestotug (EOS-448/GSKFF28849A) for the treatment of NSCLC and HNSCC, with ongoing Phase 3 trials and Phase 2 platform studies showing promising data. The company's President and CEO, Michel Detheux, expressed enthusiasm for a pivotal year with various data readouts and further progress in their oncology portfolio.

news.headline: Constellation Energy buys Calpine for $16.4B.

Global wellness real estate market projected to grow at 14.8% CAGR, reaching USD 2,034.1 billion by 2034, driven by demand for health-conscious living and amenities. Transformation towards holistic living spaces with eco-friendly designs and sustainable technologies. Key players like Delos Living leading with innovative strategies.
news.summary: The global wellness real estate market, valued at USD 438.3 billion in 2023, is projected to grow at a CAGR of 14.8% between 2024 and 2034, potentially reaching USD 2,034.1 billion by 2034. This growth is driven by a shift towards holistic wellness, leading to increased demand for properties incorporating eco-friendly designs, advanced air and water purification systems, and spaces connecting with nature. Consumers prioritize health, well-being, and sustainability in living and working environments. Industry leaders like Delos Living are integrating wellness features into properties, such as air purification systems and circadian lighting, to enhance overall wellness and market competitiveness. Developers are focusing on creating sustainable and innovative living solutions to meet the rising demand for wellness-oriented spaces.

news.headline: RMHC Bay Area adds 6 dynamic Board members to strengthen mission and community engagement in Palo Alto, CA.
news.summary: Six new members have been appointed to the Board of Directors of Ronald McDonald House Charities Bay Area (RMHC Bay Area) in Palo Alto, California. These individuals bring diverse backgrounds and a strong dedication to the organization's mission of supporting families and facilitating healing. One of the new members is Chase Lyman, co-chief real estate officer at the Sobrato Organization. Their contributions aim to further RMHC Bay Area's initiatives, which aim to eliminate obstacles and provide assistance to families.

news.headline: D-Wave's FY2024 bookings will surpass $23 million, a 120% increase from FY2023. Impressive growth forecasted.
news.summary: D-Wave, based in Palo Alto, California, has recently announced that their bookings for Fiscal Year 2024 are projected to surpass $23 million, showing a substantial increase of around 120% compared to Fiscal Year 2023.

news.headline: AtlasClear Holdings to build innovative financial services firm. Focus on small & middle market firms. NYSEAMEX:ATCH.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, AtlasClear Holdings, Inc. (NYSEAMEX: ATCH) intends to establish a modern financial services company. The company aims to develop an advanced platform for trading, clearing, settlement, and banking of new financial products, specifically targeting small and mid-sized financial services firms. The Executive Chairman of AtlasClear Holdings expressed delight in sharing this information with valued stockholders.

news.headline: Chemtrade Logistics Income Fund appoints new trustee to its board.
news.summary: A recent report shows that the current unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The report also indicates that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the same period. This uptick in job creation has had a positive impact on various sectors, with the retail and hospitality industries showing particularly strong growth. Furthermore, the report highlights that the average hourly earnings have increased by 2.5% compared to last year. Overall, these findings point to a robust and improving job market, providing hope for economic recovery in the near future.

news.headline: Robinhood introduced its cryptocurrency business in 2018. If one invested $1,000 then, it would have significantly grown.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD), a commission-free trading platform, has significantly expanded its cryptocurrency business in recent years to cater to the growing interest in digital assets. In February 2018, after focusing on stocks and exchange-traded funds, the company officially introduced cryptocurrency trading on its mobile app. Through its cryptocurrency arm, Robinhood Crypto, users can engage in trading popular coins like Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), and Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE). Since its debut as a publicly traded company in 2021, Robinhood has explored various avenues related to cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: UK: We are confident there is enough gas and electricity capacity for winter.
Marengo Therapeutics to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan. 16, 2025, showcasing recent clinical progress in precision T cell activation.
news.summary: A company presentation is set to take place on Thursday, January 16, 2025, at 10AM PT, following significant clinical advancements. Marengo Therapeutics, Inc., headquartered in Cambridge, Massachusetts, announced these updates on January 10, 2025, through a press release distributed by PRNewswire. Marengo Therapeutics, Inc. focuses on innovative methods for precision T cell activation in the clinical-stage biotechnology sector.

news.headline: Aurora Cannabis launches internship program in Germany to foster future leaders in medical cannabis industry.Total of 25 internships offered at manufacturing facility in Leuna, Germany.#AuroraCannabis #Internship #MedicalCannabis
news.summary: Aurora Cannabis Inc., a prominent global medical cannabis company listed on NASDAQ and TSX under the symbols ACB, has initiated an internship program at its manufacturing facility located in Leuna, Germany. The program aims to develop upcoming leaders in the medical cannabis sector. The news was announced on January 10, 2025, from the company's headquarters in Edmonton, AB.

news.headline: Nektar Therapeutics finishes enrollment in REZOLVE-AD Phase 2b trial for atopic dermatitis patients. #NKTR #EnrollmentComplete
news.summary: In San Francisco on January 10, 2025, Nektar Therapeutics reported reaching the target enrollment for its REZOLVE-AD Phase 2b trial for rezpegaldesleukin in patients with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis. The study involves Nasdaq-listed NKTR and aims to assess the efficacy of rezpegaldesleukin.

news.headline: Aircastle reports Q3 2024: $194M revenue, $18M net income, $182M Adjusted EBITDA, 8 planes acquired for $259M.
news.summary: In the quarter ending on November 30, 2024, the company reported impressive financial figures, including total revenues totaling $194 million and a net income of $18 million. The adjusted EBITDA stood at $182 million. During this period, the company made a significant investment in acquiring 8 aircraft amounting to $259 million, which included 2 A320neo family aircraft and 2 E2 aircraft. Additionally, the company successfully sold 8 aircraft and other flight equipment as part of its business operations.

news.headline: Walgreens reports Q1 fiscal 2025 results ended Nov 30, 2024. CEO Tim Wentworth emphasizes execution against 2025 priorities.
news.summary: Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc. released its financial results for the initial quarter of fiscal 2025, ending on November 30, 2024. CEO Tim Wentworth mentioned the company's focus on key 2025 goals: stabilizing the retail pharmacy through footprint optimization, cost control, cash flow enhancement, and addressing reimbursement models. The company is listed on the Nasdaq as WBA.

news.headline: Neogen reports Q2 revenue of $231.3 million, net loss of $456.3 million, and adjusted net income of $24.4 million.
news.summary: In Lansing, Michigan, on January 10, 2025, a company reported revenue of $231.3 million. They faced a net loss of $456.3 million primarily due to non-cash goodwill impairment, resulting in a loss of $(2.10) per diluted share. Despite this, the adjusted net income was $24.4 million, equivalent to $0.11 per diluted share. The company also disclosed an adjusted EBITDA of $51.4 million. As a response to the performance, they decided to update their full-year guidance.

news.headline: Cipia-FS10 now includes ADAS for comprehensive fleet safety, enhancing driver monitoring for efficiency.
news.summary: Cipia's FS10, a recognized driver fatigue and distraction detection system, has been upgraded to include Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) for improved fleet safety and operational effectiveness. The company, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, announced the launch on January 10, 2025. Cipia, traded on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange under the symbol CPIA, continues to be a prominent player in this field.

news.headline: Aktis Oncology to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan. 10, 2025. Matthew Roden, Ph.D. to speak.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Aktis Oncology, a Boston-based oncology company, revealed their mission to harness the potential of targeted radiopharmaceuticals for patient groups overlooked by current technologies. Matthew Roden, Ph.D., was announced as the President of the company.

news.headline: Global licensing agreement: Mediar Therapeutics & Lilly to advance WISP1 Antibody for Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis. IPF Phase 2 trial initiation expected in 1H 2025.
news.summary: Mediar Therapeutics, Inc. has announced plans to move forward with the advancement of MTX-463 by conducting an IPF Phase 2 trial, which is anticipated to begin in the first half of 2025. The company, headquartered in Boston, is a clinical stage biotechnology company specializing in developing novel therapies to combat fibrosis. This venture signifies a significant step in the company's progress towards potentially groundbreaking treatment options.

news.headline: NY Stem Cell Foundation teams up to speed up drug discovery for neurodegenerative diseases using AI and automated systems.
news.summary: NYSCF Research Institute in New York revealed a partnership on January 10, 2025, to utilize their automated cell culture systems and artificial intelligence for studying diseases at a remarkable cellular level. This initiative aims to enhance research capabilities in understanding diseases.

news.headline: Tel Aviv Stock Exchange buys back 4,622,028 shares from Manikay Fund on Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: Tel Aviv, Israel - On January 9, 2025, the Tel-Aviv Stock Exchange Ltd. (TASE: TASE) disclosed a buyback deal with Manikay Global Opportunities Holdings 1, LLC ("Manikay Fund") involving 4,622,028 shares.

news.headline: Beef remains popular in 2025 food trends - "It's What's For Dinner" brand emphasizes beef's versatility.
news.summary: The renowned Beef. It's What's For Dinner. brand is shining a spotlight on beef's alignment with the latest trends for the upcoming year. In Denver on January 10, 2025, the brand emphasizes the excitement surrounding the new year and the opportunities to explore cooking with beef while embracing novel culinary trends.

news.headline: Private equity firm Branford Castle Partners acquires Eastern Dental Management from Staple Street Capital.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Branford Castle Partners, a private equity firm in North America, has revealed the acquisition of Eastern Dental Management, a prominent dental services organization. The purchase was made from an affiliate overseen by Staple.

news.headline: Two brands in Five Star Franchising named 2025 Top Franchises, Card My Yard and Five Star Bath Solutions excel in support.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted independently revealed that owners have expressed high levels of satisfaction with the support and overall performance of Card My Yard and Five Star Bath Solutions. These two brands are part of the Five Star Franchising portfolio. The survey was conducted in Springville, Utah and the results were released on January 10, 2025. The positive feedback from owners highlights the effectiveness and quality of services provided by these brands.

news.headline: ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. will release Q4 2024 results on Jan 30, 2025, followed by conference call and webcast at 10am ET.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Englewood Cliffs, NJ - ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: CNOB), announced its intention to share its fourth-quarter outcomes as of December 31, 2024, pre-market on January 30, 2025. The conference call and audio webcast, scheduled for 10:00 a.m. ET on January 30, 2025, will delve into ConnectOne's financial and operational achievements during that period.

news.headline: atai Life Sciences appoints new leadership: Srinivas Rao as CEO, Kevin Craig as CMO, Glenn Short as CSO, Gerd Kochendoerfer as COO.
news.summary: Dr. Srinivas Rao, holder of both M.D. and Ph.D. degrees, has been appointed as the sole Chief Executive Officer of the company. Dr. Kevin Craig, M.D., has been promoted to the position of Chief Medical Officer, while Dr. Glenn Short, Ph.D., has been elevated to the role of Chief Scientific Officer. Additionally, Dr. Gerd Kochendoerfer, Ph.D., has joined the organization as the new Chief Operating Officer.

news.headline: GH Research PLC meets primary endpoint in 2 phase 2a trials with GH001, completes FDA requests, no respiratory toxicity in non-rodents. Dublin, Jan 10, 2025. Nasdaq: GHRS.
news.summary: Dublin, on January 10, 2025 - GH Research PLC (Nasdaq: GHRS), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical enterprise focusing on revolutionizing the management of psychiatric and neurological ailments, disclosed the latest advancements in its operations and emphasized significant impending goals.

news.headline: Arvinas to start first-line phase 3 trial in 2025 combining Vepdegestrant with Pfizer's CDK4 inhibitor; second-line trial also planned with CDK4/6 inhibitor. Corporate updates included.
news.summary: Vepdegestrant is set to be paired with Pfizer's new CDK4 inhibitor, atirmociclib, in an upcoming Phase 3 trial scheduled to begin in 2025 as a first-line treatment. Additionally, a second Phase 3 combination trial is in the works that will see vepdegestrant combined with a CDK4/6 inhibitor, with plans for this trial also to commence in 2025.

news.headline: BioCryst reports $437M in 2024 ORLADEYO revenue, up 34% from last year.
Invivyd continues to neutralize SARS-CoV-2 variant XEC with PEMGARDA™ and VYD2311; 69% of U.S. variants are XEC & KP.3.1.1; CDC report mentioned.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, WALTHAM, Massachusetts, Invivyd, Inc. (Nasdaq: IVVD), a biopharmaceutical firm focusing on shielding against severe viral infections, revealed new in vitro neutralization data demonstrating sustained neutralizing activity of PEMGARDA™ (pemivibart) and pipeline candidate VYD2311 against the predominant SARS-CoV-2 variant XEC. The data align with previously reported findings for KP.3.1.1, reflecting structural similarities. The Centers for Disease Control (CDC) reported that XEC and KP.3.1.1 comprised 69% of circulating U.S. SARS-CoV-2 variants in the two weeks ending December 21, 2024. Invivyd collected these results as part of its virology initiative, utilizing a reliable third-party pseudoviral system to assess pemivibart’s efficacy.

news.headline: Tilray's Q2 2025 gross profit rose by 29% YoY to reach $61 million, demonstrating growth across all four business segments.
news.summary: In the second quarter, gross profit experienced a significant 29% year-over-year boost, surging to $61 million. This growth was witnessed across all four business segments, indicating a strong performance throughout the company's operations.

news.headline: Bio-Techne introduces AI-designed proteins to boost cell therapy and regenerative medicine. $TECH.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, a renowned company Bio-Techne (NASDAQ: TECH) introduced cutting-edge designer proteins created with sophisticated Artificial Intelligence (AI) design technologies and protein evolution processes. This launch signifies a significant advancement in the realm of life science tools and reagents.

news.headline: Fintech nsave launches investment platform offering protection from inflation, secures $18mn financing from TQ Ventures, Sequoia Capital, Y Combinator, ACE Ventures, and Proton.
news.summary: Nsave is now providing reliable foreign currency accounts in dollars, pounds, or euros to individuals residing in nations with significant inflation rates. Clients are granted access to various US equities, ETFs, and funds. In an $18 million financing round led by TQ Ventures, notable investors such as Sequoia Capital, Y Combinator, ACE Ventures, and Proton also participated.

news.headline: ez1099 2024 Edition tax software is now available for electronic filing for the 2025 tax season. Designed for US business owners, tax professionals, and entrepreneurs, it can process unlimited forms for multiple companies for one flat rate.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, on January 10, 2025, a new ez1099 tax form software has been launched by Halfpricesoft.com. This software is specifically tailored for US business owners, tax professionals, and entrepreneurs. It offers a user-friendly interface and the capability to streamline the processing of unlimited forms for multiple companies at a single flat rate. This software is designed to simplify tax-related tasks and is geared towards providing convenience and efficiency for users dealing with tax forms in the United States.

news.headline: Positive results from Phase 2 trial of Atumelnant in CAH: Achieved up to 80% reduction of Androstenedione, showing substantial improvement.
news.summary: Significant reductions in key biomarkers have been achieved across various doses, including a mean reduction of up to 80% in Androstenedione levels. The reductions observed were rapid, substantial, and consistent over time, showing statistically significant results. This data underscores the effectiveness of the treatment in targeting and lowering these biomarkers, highlighting its potential impact on specific health parameters.

news.headline: Abaxx Exchange launches Nickel Sulphate futures trading - 1st of battery metals - Jan 10, 2025.
news.summary: On Jan. 10, 2025, Abaxx Technologies Inc. launched Nickel Sulphate futures for trading. Abaxx, a financial software and market infrastructure firm and indirect majority stakeholder in Abaxx Singapore Pte Ltd., which owns Abaxx Commodity Exchange and Clearinghouse, introduced this product. The company also produces the SmarterMarkets™ Podcast. Nickel Sulphate futures mark the first battery metals offering by Abaxx Technologies Inc., traded under CBOE:ABXX and OTCQX:ABXXF.

news.headline: Green Thumb Industries partners with Chicago's Salt Shed for a 2-year deal, introducing RISE Dispensaries and RYTHM products.
news.summary: Chicago and Vancouver-based Green Thumb Industries Inc. (CSE: GTII) (OTCQX: GTBIF) has entered into an exclusive two-year partnership with The Salt Shed, a popular music venue in Chicago, effective January 1, 2025. As part of the collaboration, Rise Dispensaries, owned by Green Thumb, will set up an on-site retail experience called RISE at Salt Shed, featuring hemp-derived THC Delta 9 products from Green Thumb's brands like incredibles and Beboe. This marks The Salt Shed’s most significant cannabis partnership yet, providing concert attendees and performers with immersive experiences from Green Thumb's RYTHM Premium Cannabis flower brand. The initiative aims to enhance the connection between cannabis and music at the heart of Windy City’s vibrant music scene.

news.headline: Amplify Energy to chat with Alliance Global Partners on Jan 23, 2025. (NYSE: AMPY) CEO to join fireside talk.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Houston-based Amplify Energy Corp. (NYSE: AMPY) disclosed plans for its involvement in a fireside chat conducted by Jeff Grampp, Senior Analyst at Alliance Global Partners. This event is scheduled for January 23, 2025. Amplify Energy Corp. ("Amplify" or "the Company") will be represented in this discussion, providing insights into its operations and performance. An opportunity for stakeholders and market participants to engage with management and gain valuable information is set for this forthcoming event.

news.headline: EnviroGold Global raises up to $4 million by upsizing unit offering due to investor interest, each unit consists of $1,000.
news.summary: EnviroGold Global Limited has expanded its non-brokered private placement financing to raise up to CAD $4,000,000 due to increased investor interest. This will involve issuing up to 4,000 units at a price of CAD$1,000 per Unit. Each unit will consist of CAD$1,000 principal amount of unsecured convertible notes and 11,112 common share purchase warrants of the Company. The terms of the Financing remain unchanged from the Company’s December 19, 2024, news release. EnviroGold is a technology firm that helps the mining industry extract valuable metals from mine waste and tailings, thus reducing environmental liabilities and enhancing social and environmental outcomes.

news.headline: Plymouth Industrial REIT updates on Q4 2024 activity. Details for Q4 earnings conference call shared.
news.summary: Information has been released regarding the upcoming fourth quarter earnings conference call. The call will cover the financial results for the previous quarter, with key figures such as revenue, profits, and expenses being discussed. Shareholders and analysts are encouraged to participate in the conference call to gain insight into the company's performance over the past three months. The call is scheduled to take place on [date] at [time], with details on how to join the call provided on the company's website. This quarter's earnings report is highly anticipated, as it will shed light on the company's financial health and prospects moving forward.

news.headline: Spero Therapeutics appoints Esther Rajavelu as interim CEO, Frank Thomas as chairman amidst leadership changes.
news.summary: Esther Rajavelu has been named as the interim President and Chief Executive Officer, while Frank Thomas has been appointed as the Chairman of the Board.

news.headline: Bio-Path Holdings updates on clinical and operations till 2025.
Aspo board member no longer facing charges in Ramirent Plc case, legal action withdrawn. #news #Aspo #Ramirent
Joshua H. Levine joins EDAP's Board of Directors.
Immunocore announces plans to reach more mUM patients globally with KIMMTRAK by 2025 through increased launches and community penetration.
news.summary: In 2025, KIMMTRAK (tebentafusp) aims to extend its reach to a larger number of mUM patients worldwide through new launches and enhanced community outreach efforts. The plan is to introduce the medication to a significant number of new patients to expand its impact within the medical community.

news.headline: Bunge to release Q4 2024 results on Feb 5, 2025, with call at 7:00 am CT; slide presentation on www.bunge.com.
news.summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) is set to release its quarterly results for the period ending December 31, 2024, on Wednesday, February 5, 2025. This announcement will be made before the market opens. The management of the company will also conduct a conference call at 7:00 a.m. Central Time on the same day to delve into the details of the results. A presentation will be shared on www.bunge.com to complement this discussion. For those interested in accessing the webcast, they can visit the "Investor Center" section on the company's website and navigate to "News & Events" under "Events & Presentations".

news.headline: SP Group A/S initiated a share buy-back program on 26 August 2024 following announcement #12/2024 on 23 August 2024.
news.summary: SP Group launched a share repurchase program on 26 August 2024 following company announcement no. 12/2024 dated 23 August 2024.

news.headline: Constellation to acquire Calpine, becoming leading producer of clean energy; agreement announced in Baltimore and Houston.
news.summary: Today, Constellation and Calpine Corp. have entered a definitive agreement for Constellation to acquire Calpine. This merger between the two companies will involve a substantial buyout deal. The acquisition is expected to have a significant impact on the market and will create a stronger entity in the energy sector. Both companies are well-known players in the industry, and this move is anticipated to boost their market presence and competitiveness. The agreement marks a significant milestone in the corporate landscape, with implications for stakeholders and consumers alike.

news.headline: BD appoints Pamela Spikner as Chief Accounting Officer and Controller on Jan 10, 2025. She will start on Jan 20.
news.summary: A prominent medical technology company, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), based in Franklin Lakes, N.J., disclosed on Jan. 10, 2025, that Pamela Spikner is appointed as the senior vice president, chief accounting officer, and controller, starting on January 20. BD is listed on the NYSE under ticker symbol BDX. This new appointment highlights the company's commitment to strengthening its financial leadership team.

news.headline: Ronald S. Lauder retiring from The Estée Lauder Companies' Board of Directors (NYSE: EL). Daughter Jane Lauder remains; son-in-law appointed as director.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made by The Estée Lauder Companies, Ronald S. Lauder is stepping down from the Company's Board of Directors (NYSE: EL) with immediate effect. According to the stockholders' agreement with the Lauder family and the Company, Mr. Lauder has the privilege to nominate two directors. Jane Lauder, his daughter, will retain her current position on the Board. Eric Zinterhofer, Mr. Lauder's son-in-law and married to his daughter, has been appointed as a new member of the Board.

news.headline: US stock futures declined before Friday's crucial jobs data with all major indices falling slightly. Important numbers: Nasdaq 100 -0.03%, S&P 500 -0.08%, Dow Jones -0.01% in premarket trading. Unemployment expected to stay at 4.2%. 10-year Treasury at 4.70%, 2-year at 4.29%. Initial jobless claims at an 11-month low with private companies adding 122,000 jobs in Dec. Markets were mixed on Wed with Dow up over 100 points.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures fell ahead of the release of December's non-farm payroll data, with all major indices decreasing in premarket trade. Economists predict a softening in job growth compared to November, expecting the unemployment rate to stay at 4.2%. Treasury notes had yields of 4.70% and 4.29% for 10-year and two-year notes, respectively. Futures for Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 were down by 0.03%, 0.08%, 0.01%, and 0.17%, respectively. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was at $589.31, down 0.03%, while the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF was at $514.97, down 0.058% in premarket trading. The Dow Jones gained over 100 points with uncertainty in Fed minutes about future rate cuts, and Acuity Brands Inc. reported lower revenue for Q1. Initial jobless claims decreased to an 11-month low, indicating a tightening labor market. Consumer staples, healthcare, and materials sectors led gains in the S&P 500, while energy and communication services sectors saw declines.
